text: Artificial intelligence, or AI, is the ability of computers and machines to perform tasks that normally require human intelligence, such as learning, reasoning, and solving problems. A key part of AI is machine learning, where systems improve their performance by analysing data without being explicitly programmed for every step. A more advanced form is deep learning, which uses complex neural networks to process information in layers, similar to the human brain. AI is already part of our daily lives: it powers voice assistants like Siri, recommends movies on streaming platforms, and helps cars drive safely. As AI evolves, it continues to shape how we work, communicate, and live.
